AI reveals surprising truth about Jesse James in new documentary. Outlaw born in 1847, led gang in bank robberies. WANTED poster key image.
news.summary: A notorious figure in American history, Jesse James, born in 1847 in Missouri, led a gang responsible for multiple bank and train robberies across the Midwest post-Civil War. His elusive profile was largely attributed to the fact that very few knew his appearance. The iconic WANTED poster from the early 1880s featuring James' sharp-jawed image became synonymous with the outlaw. Despite being America's most famous outlaw, James managed to escape justice for years until recent advancements in AI technology have enabled experts to potentially unveil his true likeness.

news.headline: Putin starts press briefing, emphasizes economic matters.
Analyst advises buying tech stocks before Trump rally, citing potential gains. #stockmarket #investing
X Financial (NYSE: XYF) to repurchase $48.7M shares from major shareholder on Dec. 16, 2024. Summary: Share repurchase worth $48.7M by X Financial from major shareholder.
news.summary: X Financial, a prominent online personal finance company in China, headquartered in Shenzhen, disclosed on December 19, 2024, about a repurchase deal made with a key shareholder on December 16, 2024. The deal, in line with NYSE trading under the symbol XYF, involved a significant number of shares being repurchased by the company.

news.headline: Strike involving 10,000+ grocery workers at Save Mart/Lucky/FoodMaxx narrowly averted with tentative contract agreement.
news.summary: More than 10,000 grocery workers at Save Mart/Lucky/FoodMaxx in Concord, Calif., narrowly avoided a strike as Union and management negotiators arrived at a tentative contract agreement at 1:30 a.m. The resolution came after extensive negotiations overseen by Federal Mediator Isael Hermosillo. UFCW 8-Golden State, along with UFCW Locals 5, 648, and 770, announced plans to present the agreement to Union members for feedback and approval.

news.headline: UnionPay International partners with Weixin Pay to enable more users of international UnionPay-powered e-wallets to make Weixin QR payments in China. Dec 17 collaboration announced.
news.summary: UnionPay International has partnered with Weixin Pay to allow more users of international UnionPay-powered e-wallets to make Weixin QR payments in mainland China. The collaboration, announced on December 17, 2024, opens up this payment option to a larger user base. This expansion is expected to significantly impact convenience for users, with an estimated increase of users and transactions using this service in the near future.

news.headline: AS Elenger Grupp approved by Competition Authority to acquire 100% shares in EWE Polska from EWE AG, operating in Poland.
news.summary: Elenger Grupp, a subsidiary of Infortar, and EWE AG have finalized a deal on October 31, 2024, wherein EWE AG will sell all shares (100%) of its subsidiary EWE Polska to Elenger Grupp. EWE Polska, based in Poland, oversees two subsidiaries - EWE Energia and EWE Przesył.

news.headline: Special coverage by China Daily celebrates Macao's return to China after 25 years. Live coverage ahead of anniversary.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, it will be the 25th anniversary of Macao's return to China. China Daily has started special live coverage two days before to honor Macao's progress and achievements since then. The coverage will delve into Macao's journey over the past 25 years.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs rise premarket despite Fed Chair Powell's statement on bank not accumulating BTC. ETFs incl Bitwise (BITB) +1.08%, ARK (ARKB) +1.41%, GBTC +1.32%, FBTC +1.04%, IBIT +1.26%. Fed cannot hold BTC legally. [Character count: 283]
news.summary: Bitcoin ETFs experienced a premarket surge despite Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's statement that the central bank has no intention of holding Bitcoin. The Bitwise Bitcoin ETF (NYSE:BITB) rose by 1.08%, ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF (BATS:ARKB) increased by 1.41%, Grayscale Bitcoin Trust (BTC) (NYSE:GBTC) saw a 1.32% climb, Fidelity Wise Origin Bitcoin Fund (BATS:FBTC) advanced by 1.04%, and iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (NASDAQ:IBIT) gained 1.26%. Powell, speaking post the Fed's recent policy meeting, reiterated that the central bank is prohibited from acquiring Bitcoin due to legal constraints.

news.headline: Putin: Practically all NATO nations are fighting against Russia.
Genethon's GNT0004 gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy approved for Phase 3 pivotal trials, a major milestone by 2024.
news.summary: In Paris, Genethon has announced that their gene therapy, GNT0004, designed for treating Duchene muscular dystrophy, has received approval to advance to Phase 3 pivotal trials. This development marks a significant milestone in research for this rare genetic disorder, affecting an estimated 1 in 3,500 to 5,000 male births globally. The trial will involve assessing the therapy's effectiveness and safety in a larger patient population, with high hopes for its potential impact on those suffering from the condition.
